# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-container
        image: <image_name>
        imagePullPolicy: Always
